title: Beyond Pills: 3 Non-Pharma Healthcare Stocks for Healthy Gains
text: When you consider healthcare stocks, do you automatically think of pharmaceutical companies? Most people do.

title: PBH vs. BSX: Which Stock Should Value Investors Buy Now?
text: Investors interested in stocks from the Medical - Products sector have probably already heard of Prestige Consumer Healthcare (PBH) and Boston Scientific (BSX). But which of these two stocks presents investors with the better value opportunity right now?

title: ADVENT Offers Up An Early Present For Boston Scientific Investors
text: Boston Scientific surprised the Street with better-than-expected ADVENT study results; Farapulse delivered better procedural success rates with good safety and lower procedure times. Farapulse will likely reach the U.S. market in mid-2024, giving Boston Scientific real momentum in an $8B market. Other drivers of growth for Boston Scientific include the Watchman device, new CRM products, and potential M&A opportunities.

title: Boston Scientific Reports Positive Results from Atrial Fibrillation Device
text: Boston Scientific (BSX) was the best-performing stock in the S&P 500 after the medical device maker reported positive results from a clinical trial for its system to treat patients with atrial fibrillation (AF).

title: Boston Scientific shares propel higher on positive atrial fibrillation trial results
text: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) shares rose almost 5% after the biotechnology company reported positive results from its pivotal atrial fibrillation (AF) trial. The trial compared the company's FARAPULSE Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) System against standard-of-care ablation for AF, a type of abnormal heartbeat.

title: Boston Scientific Surges As It Looks To Enter A Market Worth Nearly $8 Billion
text: Boston Scientific is likely to win FDA approval for a new method of treating abnormal heartbeats. BSX stock surged on its Phase 3 win.

title: ADVENT Study of the FARAPULSE™ Pulsed Field Ablation System Meets Primary Efficacy and Safety Endpoints
text: Noninferiority established through high treatment success, low adverse event rates Findings presented at ESC Congress 2023 and simultaneously published in The New England Journal of Medicine MARLBOROUGH, Mass. and AMSTERDAM , Aug. 27, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced positive 12-month results from the pivotal ADVENT clinical trial of the FARAPULSE™ Pulsed Field Ablation (PFA) System*, a nonthermal treatment in which electric fields selectively ablate heart tissue in patients with atrial fibrillation (AF).

title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Expands Globally Amid FX Concerns
text: Boston Scientific's (BSX) Endoscopy business within MedSurg is gaining from strong worldwide demand for its broad range of GI and pulmonary treatment options.

title: Which Is A Better Buy – Boston Scientific Stock Or Abbott?
text: Sharpe is a measure of return per unit of risk, and high-performance portfolios can provide the best of both worlds.

title: Boston Scientific's (BSX) POLARx System Gets FDA Approval
text: Boston Scientific's (BSX) POLARx enables doctors to expand and modify the new POLARx catheter to match a patient's unique anatomy during an ablation treatment.

title: Boston Scientific Receives FDA Approval for the POLARx™ Cryoablation System
text: First-of-its-kind expandable cryoballoon catheter advances cryoablation therapy, addresses key limitations with traditional systems MARLBOROUGH, Mass. , Aug. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) today announced it has received U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approval for the POLARx™ Cryoablation System.

title: Stocks This Week: Hold Netflix And Sell Short Boston Scientific
text: Over the near term, the indices are likely to move higher into the 14th. The autumn correction will not be hard on many stocks such as Netflix.
